name: tins2026-scripts
description: Dev/ops scripts for the TINS 2026 starter kit. The frame generator + load-test harness are zero-dep; only the atlas rasteriser (build-atlas) needs sharp.

scripts.sprites: node gen-sprites.js --force && node build-atlas.js && node verify-atlas.js
scripts.tiles: node gen-tiles.js --force && node build-tileset.js && node verify-tileset.js
